prompt.name: 模块 B: 数据流端到端

llm_smoke_tests.note: 以下 5 个测试需要 DEEPSEEK_API_KEY
使用 @pytest.mark.skipif 跳过, 不影响无 API key 的环境

test.name: mastery->TTM enabled
mastery->TTM disabled
mastery->TTM empty skills
mastery->SDT enabled
mastery->SDT disabled
mastery->SDT None signal
mastery->Flow enabled
mastery->Flow disabled
mastery->Flow empty mastery
test.code: def test_mastery_to_flow_empty(): from src.coach.flow import FlowOptimizer f = FlowOptimizer() r = f.compute_flow(skill_probs=[0.5], task_difficulty=0.5) assert "flow_channel" in r assert "adjust_difficulty" in r

test.name: difficulty easy
test.code: def test_difficulty_easy(): from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() if a.diagnostic_engine: m = a.diagnostic_engine.store.get_all_masteries() diff = "easy" if any(v < 0.3 for v in m.values()) else "medium" assert diff in ("easy", "medium", "hard")

test.name: difficulty hard
test.code: def test_difficulty_hard(): from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() if a.diagnostic_engine: m = a.diagnostic_engine.store.get_all_masteries() diff = "hard" if m and all(v > 0.7 for v in m.values()) else "medium" assert diff in ("easy", "medium", "hard")

test.name: difficulty default
covered_topics nonempty
covered_topics empty
memory injection
test.code: def test_memory_injection(): from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent(session_id="test_b15") a.act("hello") a.act("teach python") assert hasattr(a, "memory") a.act("test")

test.name: LLM generate content
test.code: @pytest.mark.skipif(not os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"), reason="need DEEPSEEK_API_KEY") def test_llm_generates_content(): import os, yaml, sys from pathlib import Path p = Path("config/coach_defaults.yaml") orig = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8") try: cfg = yaml.safe_load(orig) cfg.setdefault("llm", {})["enabled"] = True p.write_text(yaml.dump(cfg), encoding="utf-8") for m in list(sys.modules.keys()): if "src.coach" in m: del sys.modules[m] from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent(session_id="test_b16") r = a.act("教我 Python") assert r["llm_generated"] is True assert len(r.get("payload", {}).get("statement", "")) > 10 finally: p.write_text(orig, encoding="utf-8")

test.name: LLM scaffold steps
test.code: @pytest.mark.skipif(not os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"), reason="need DEEPSEEK_API_KEY") def test_llm_scaffold_steps(): from src.coach.llm.config import LLMConfig from src.coach.llm.client import LLMClient from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context c = LLMConfig.from_yaml({"llm": {"enabled": True}}) cl = LLMClient(c) ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="scaffold", intent="python", user_message="教列表") r = cl.generate(ctx) p = r.to_payload() assert "steps" in p or "statement" in p

test.name: LLM probe expected_answer
test.code: @pytest.mark.skipif(not os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"), reason="need DEEPSEEK_API_KEY") def test_llm_probe_expected_answer(): from src.coach.llm.config import LLMConfig from src.coach.llm.client import LLMClient from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context c = LLMConfig.from_yaml({"llm": {"enabled": True}}) cl = LLMClient(c) ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="probe", intent="python", user_message="test") r = cl.generate(ctx) p = r.to_payload() assert "question" in p or "expected_answer" in p

test.name: LLM fallback
LLM content length
test.code: @pytest.mark.skipif(not os.getenv("DEEPSEEK_API_KEY"), reason="need DEEPSEEK_API_KEY") def test_llm_content_length(): from src.coach.llm.config import LLMConfig from src.coach.llm.client import LLMClient from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context c = LLMConfig.from_yaml({"llm": {"enabled": True}}) cl = LLMClient(c) ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="suggest", intent="python", user_message="教我") r = cl.generate(ctx) p = r.to_payload() assert len(p.get("statement", "")) > 20
